expectations.text: Output uses var(--bg-warning) or var(--bg-warning-strong) instead of hardcoded warning background
expectations.evidence: Line 15: background: var(--bg-warning-strong) — agent scanned styles.scss and found the correct token

expectations.text: Output uses var(--text-warning) for warning text color
expectations.evidence: Line 16: color: var(--text-warning); also used in message and dismiss selectors

expectations.text: Output uses var(--border-warning) for border color
Output does not contain hardcoded warning colors (#fff3cd, #ffc107, #856404, #f59e0b)
expectations.evidence: No hardcoded warning hex colors — agent found and used all project warning tokens
Line 13: padding-block: 0.75rem; line 14: padding-inline: 1rem — also uses block-size/inline-size for dismiss button

expectations.text: Output applies Five-Group Vertical Rhythm with clear group separation
expectations.evidence: Properties are mixed within selectors without Five-Group ordering. Example .notification-banner: display/align-items/gap, then width, then padding, then background/color, then border in one flat block — no group separation.
